title: Umami Rich British Parmesan Cheese Salad
description: This low-carb-friendly umami-rich salad features marinated parmesan cheese and perfectly seasoned with parma ham for a romantic twist on traditional dishes.

ingredients.name: Pitted Prunes
ingredients.notes: optional for added sweetness and texture

instructions: Prepare the marinated parmesan cheese according to package instructions, or use store-bought if preferred.
Mix together olive oil and red wine vinegar in a small bowl until emulsified. Add salt and pepper to taste.
Arrange the grated Parmesan on a baking sheet and brush evenly with the dressing. Bake for 5-7 minutes or until the cheese is golden brown and melts slightly.
Gently reheat prunes if using, then place them atop the baked parmesan slices in the center of each serving plate.
Top each slice with thin slices of parma ham. Garnish with fresh herbs.
Serve immediately for best texture and flavor.
